step_rationale: Increased phosphatidylglycerol predicts post-MI mortality; myocardial injury severity and membrane remodeling marker.
mechanism: Increased PG (18:1/18:1) content post-MI reflects cardiolipin metabolism alterations and myocardial ischemic injury.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
